codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly fulfills the feature description. The /dashboard/products page conditionally renders a data table (with Name, GTIN, Serial Number, Status badge, Created date) or an empty state. Pagination is implemented. The rows are clickable. The /dashboard/products/new page handles Name, GTIN (with client side check digit validation), Serial Number, Category, and Description. The form properly handles error states and redirects on 201. The sidebar was implicitly updated.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker encountered EMFILE errors when running the Next.js dev server (`pnpm dev` for dashboard), which caused all routes to return 404 because file watching failed. They worked around this by building and running in production mode (`next start`), which successfully bypassed the EMFILE issue on this macOS machine.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: 'The server is up but returning 404. EMFILE errors might be causing file watching issues... Let me try killing everything and running with next start (production mode)'. Handoff explicitly mentions this as a discovered issue and suggests adding a note in AGENTS.md about using `next start` or setting a higher file descriptor limit.

summary: Implementation is solid and covers all requested features. Proper use of @galileo/shared and shadcn/ui components. Form validation handles errors gracefully. Pagination is built in. No significant issues found. Recorded a knowledge gap about Next.js dev server EMFILE limit on the machine.
